emails.subject: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: Susan, Tri-States comments. I plan to give them Colorado law but to discuss the other two with them. Let me know your thoughts. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 09/11/2000 07:14 PM "Nocera, Dave" <dnocera@tristategt.org> 09/08/2000 10:41 AM

emails.subject: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: Susan, Tri-States comments. I plan to give them Colorado law but to discuss the other two with them. Let me know your thoughts. Forwarded by Gerald Nemec/HOU/ECT on 09/11/2000 07:14 PM "Nocera, Dave" <dnocera@tristategt.org> 09/08/2000 10:41 AM

emails.subject: Re: Confidentiality Agreement
emails.body: Re: Confidentiality Agreement I think that ultimately I would feel OK about giving them #1 and #2 under the circumstances, if these guys are really that concerned about these issues. I really don't think TW is ever going to breach its confidentiality obligations. I need to get Drew's clearance for Colorado law; I'll get back to you. Gerald Nemec@ECT 09/11/2000 07:17 PM
